what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links the design-assets channel to an image asset via a typed target URI and a creation timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Fields include id att-dec7c9ad, channel design-assets, attachment_type images, target image://design-assets/icons/image (52), and added 2026-06-22T12:26:26.461171+00:00.
The target URI contains a space and parentheses in the final path segment.
standouts: The target URI uses an image:// scheme with a path segment containing a space and parentheses: 'icons/image (52)'.
The channel name is design-assets, suggesting an asset-oriented channel.
conventions: Uses a YAML frontmatter metadata block.
Follows a ledger-style attachment schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
concerns: The target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing or linking issues.
No filename, MIME type, dimensions, or uploader metadata is recorded.
The meaning of '(52)' in the target path is not explained in this file.
notes: A minimal attachment ledger entry that points the design-assets channel to an image asset at image://design-assets/icons/image (52).
questions: What actual file does 'image (52)' refer to?
Is the space/parentheses in the target URI intentional or an artifact?
Should there be additional asset metadata such as MIME type or dimensions?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment for a channel, and the content does exactly that.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a specific image asset is associated with the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target URI uses a custom image:// scheme with a human-readable but unescaped path segment containing a space and parentheses.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment record that associates a typed image target with a channel, which a fused system could use to locate or reference the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only attachment ledger entry named att-dec7c9ad that links the design-assets channel to the image target image://design-assets/icons/image (52) with an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that an image asset was attached to the design-assets channel at a specific point in time.
